purpose: Answer common reader questions quickly and directly, reducing friction and improving comprehension.
writingRules: Each Q&A pair must be self-contained — reader should not need to read other sections to understand the answer
Answers should be 2–4 sentences, no more than 100 words each
Questions must be phrased as a reader would ask, not as an editor would write
Link to deeper sections in the story for readers who want more detail
Maximum 8 Q&A pairs per FAQ section
seoRules: Use FAQ schema markup for rich snippet eligibility
Each question should target a long-tail keyword
Answers must be distinct — no duplicate content across Q&As
